languages.text: "Пусть ксеносы бьются — а мы подождем, пока Бог-Император укажет нам момент через Таро Кибеллы".
"Let the xenos fight — and we shall wait for the God-Emperor to reveal the right moment through Kibellah's Tarot."
languages.original_text: "Пусть ксеносы бьются — а мы подождем, пока Бог-Император укажет нам момент через Таро Кибеллы".

traits.locale_text: "Let the xenos fight — and we shall wait for the God-Emperor to reveal the right moment through Kibellah's Tarot."
"Let the xenos fight — and we shall wait for the God-Emperor to reveal the right moment through Kibellah's Tarot."
"Let the xenos fight — and we shall wait for the God-Emperor to reveal the right moment through Kibellah's Tarot."

languages.text: 「異種族の戦いは任せて、神皇帝がキベラによるタロットで正しいタイミングを告げてくれるのを待つ」
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos fight — and we shall wait for the God-Emperor to reveal the right moment through Kibellah's Tarot."

traits.locale_text: 「異種族の戦いは任せて、神皇帝がキベラによるタロットで正しいタイミングを告げてくれるのを待つ」

languages.text: «Dejemos luchar a los xenos. El Dios Emperador revelará el momento oportuno de actuar mediante el tarot de Kibellah».
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos fight — and we shall wait for the God-Emperor to reveal the right moment through Kibellah's Tarot."

traits.locale_text: «Dejemos luchar a los xenos. El Dios Emperador revelará el momento oportuno de actuar mediante el tarot de Kibellah».

languages.text: “就让异形自相残杀吧。我们当静候神皇借由绮贝菈的圣牌，昭示合适时机。”
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos fight — and we shall wait for the God-Emperor to reveal the right moment through Kibellah's Tarot."

traits.locale_text: “就让异形自相残杀吧。我们当静候神皇借由绮贝菈的圣牌，昭示合适时机。”

languages.text: "Lasst die Xenos kämpfen ... wir warten ab, bis uns der Gottimperator über Kibellahs Tarot den richtigen Zeitpunkt offenbart."
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos fight — and we shall wait for the God-Emperor to reveal the right moment through Kibellah's Tarot."

traits.locale_text: "Lasst die Xenos kämpfen ... wir warten ab, bis uns der Gottimperator über Kibellahs Tarot den richtigen Zeitpunkt offenbart."

languages.text: "Bırakalım zenolar savaşsın. Biz de Tanrı İmparator'un, doğru anı Kibellah'nın Tarotu aracılığıyla açıklamasını bekleyelim."
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos fight — and we shall wait for the God-Emperor to reveal the right moment through Kibellah's Tarot."

traits.locale_text: "Bırakalım zenolar savaşsın. Biz de Tanrı İmparator'un, doğru anı Kibellah'nın Tarotu aracılığıyla açıklamasını bekleyelim."

languages.text: « Laissons les xénos s'affronter. Nous attendrons que l'Empereur-Dieu nous dévoile le moment opportun grâce au tarot de Kibellah. »
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos fight — and we shall wait for the God-Emperor to reveal the right moment through Kibellah's Tarot."

traits.locale_text: « Laissons les xénos s'affronter. Nous attendrons que l'Empereur-Dieu nous dévoile le moment opportun grâce au tarot de Kibellah. »
